title: Ja'far b. Yabya's Return from Syria and His Address of Thanks to the Caliph
description: Ja'far b. Yabya's Return from Syria and His Address of Thanks to the Caliph. Recorded under the year 180 AH (796–797 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 30.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
